tool_args.label: Completion of 7th Avenue to Lexington Avenue section - November 2015

payload.description: Section of 34th Street between 7th Avenue and Lexington Avenue completed with four new bus bulbs, freshly painted bus lanes, new parking/loading space, and resurfaced streets
Construction of the 34th Street SBS capital project from 12th Avenue to Lexington Avenue (West Section) was completed in 2015
Construction of the 34th Street SBS capital project from Lexington Avenue to FDR Service Road (East Section) is expected to be completed by December 2016

payload.raw_value_text: 6,440 square feet of additional pedestrian space was added to 34th Street
payload.description: In 2015, 6,440 square feet of additional pedestrian space was added to 34th Street

tool_args.label: Two additional bus bulbs to open in the future

payload.claim_text: Two additional bulbs will open in the future. The bus bulb at the northwest corner of 8th Avenue will be completed upon removal of New Yorker Hotel scaffolding and the bus bulb at the southeast corner of 11th Avenue will open upon the completion of 55 Hudson Yards.
payload.description: Future bus bulbs on the West Section pending completion of adjacent developments
